mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND DELETE_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDY_MEMBER ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NICKNAME, MEMBER_ROLE, ENROLL_DATE, DELETE_FL ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberNickname}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, MEMBER_PW AS memberPw, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, MEMBER_ROLE AS memberRole, TO_CHAR(ENROLL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrollDate, DELETE_FL AS deleteFl, PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND DELETE_FL = 'N'

SELECT MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, MEMBER_PW AS memberPw, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, MEMBER_ROLE AS memberRole, TO_CHAR(ENROLL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrollDate, DELETE_FL AS deleteFl, PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg FROM STUDY_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND DELETE_FL = 'N'
